_comment_schema: Optional: add "$schema" pointing to cursor-guard.schema.json for IDE validation. Adjust the path accordingly. | 可选：添加 "$schema" 指向 cursor-guard.schema.json 以启用 IDE 校验，请根据实际位置调整路径。
_comment_mode: Two modes: whitelist ('protect') or blacklist ('ignore'). If both are set, 'protect' is checked first, then 'ignore' excludes from it. | 两种模式：白名单 (protect) 或黑名单 (ignore)。同时设置时，先匹配 protect，再用 ignore 排除。
_comment_protect: Glob patterns for files to protect. If empty or missing, all files are protected. | 需要保护的文件 glob 模式。留空或不设置则保护所有文件。
_comment_ignore: Glob patterns for files to exclude from protection, even if matched by 'protect'. | 排除保护的文件 glob 模式，即使被 protect 匹配也会跳过。
_comment_backup_strategy: 'git': local commits to dedicated branch (default). 'shadow': file copies to .cursor-guard-backup/. 'both': git + shadow. | 'git'：提交到专用分支（默认）。'shadow'：文件拷贝到 .cursor-guard-backup/。'both'：两者同时。
_comment_auto_backup_interval_seconds: Interval in seconds for auto-backup.ps1 to check for changes. Minimum 5. | 自动备份脚本检查变更的间隔秒数，最小 5。
_comment_secrets_patterns: Glob patterns for sensitive files — auto-excluded from backup even if matched by 'protect'. Built-in defaults: .env, .env.*, *.key, *.pem, *.p12, *.pfx, credentials*. | 敏感文件 glob 模式——即使被 protect 匹配也自动排除备份。内置默认值：.env, .env.*, *.key, *.pem, *.p12, *.pfx, credentials*。
_comment_pre_restore_backup: 'always' (default): auto-preserve current version before every restore. 'ask': prompt user each time to decide. 'never': skip preservation (not recommended). User's explicit instruction in the message always overrides this config. | 'always'（默认）：恢复前自动保留当前版本。'ask'：每次恢复前询问用户。'never'：不保留（不推荐）。用户在消息中的明确指令始终优先于此配置。
_comment_retention: Retention policy for shadow copies only (git snapshots are not auto-cleaned). mode: 'days' (keep N days, default 30), 'count' (keep N newest snapshots), 'size' (keep total under N MB). | 影子拷贝的保留策略（git 快照不自动清理）。mode：'days'（保留 N 天，默认 30）、'count'（保留最新 N 份）、'size'（总大小不超过 N MB）。
_comment_retention_fields: days: used when mode='days'. max_count: used when mode='count'. max_size_mb: used when mode='size'. | days：mode='days' 时生效。max_count：mode='count' 时生效。max_size_mb：mode='size' 时生效。
